node.about: The high-tech fleece jacket features an original Monogram Camo pattern.
node.image_name: Monogram Camo Fleece Jacket 1.PNG Monogram Camo Fleece Jacket 2.PNG Monogram Camo Fleece Jacket 3.PNG Monogram Camo Fleece Jacket 4.PNG

node.about: The stylish jacket embodies a new interpretation of the legendary symbol of the House.
node.details: 87% polyester, 13% wool A color scheme Loose fit

node.itemname: Snow down jacket with Vuitton pattern
node.about: A high-tech down jacket with a water-repellent effect is a stylish and practical piece of clothing.
A hooded denim jacket with a bold graphic design in a trekking style.
node.details: 100% cotton light brown color Standard Fit
node.image_name: Padded hooded denim jacket 1.PNG Padded hooded denim jacket 2.PNG Padded hooded denim jacket 3.PNG Padded hooded denim jacket 4.PNG

node.about: The graphic design of this classic-cut jacket is a tribute to the iconic Monogram pattern with a contemporary twist.
node.details: 100% Polyester Dark blue color Classic fit
node.image_name: Monogram Gradient Mesh Jacket 1.PNG Monogram Gradient Mesh Jacket 2.PNG Monogram Gradient Mesh Jacket 3.PNG Monogram Gradient Mesh Jacket 4.PNG

node.about: The denim jacket features a contrasting combination of bright green LV Spray graphics with a Tie & Dye effect and a white Monogram pattern.
node.details: 100% cotton A color scheme Loose fit

node.about: The unique design of the utilitarian denim jacket combines tradition of impeccable craftsmanship with a contemporary deconstructivist aesthetic.
node.image_name: Destroyed utility denim jacket 1.PNG Destroyed utility denim jacket 2.PNG Destroyed utility denim jacket 3.PNG

node.about: The unique design of the utilitarian denim jacket combines tradition of impeccable craftsmanship with a contemporary deconstructivist aesthetic.
node.details: 100% cotton Dark green color Loose fit

node.about: Monogram jacquard adds an elegant touch to the bomber jacket's striking design.
node.details: 100% cotton Combination of black and gray Standard Fit

node.itemname: Monogram embossed wool and leather jacket
node.about: A classic varsity jacket made from sustainable wool.
node.details: 50% calfskin, 50% wool Black color Standard Fit

node.itemname: Varsity jacket in leather and wool with appliqués
node.about: The trendy Varsity jacket is crafted from LWG-certified wool and grained calfskin.
node.details: 100% calfskin Certification LWG Milky white color Loose fit

node.about: he striking jacket features a bold hybrid design, crafted from wool suiting for a sporty, contemporary style.
node.details: 100% wool Grey colour checkered pattern Standard Fit

node.about: Crafted from high-tech material, this regular-fit jacket is a bold take on a classic athletic style.
node.details: 100% polyamide Bright blue color Standard Fit

node.about: A quilted take on the iconic Monogram pattern, this insulated jacket is crafted from high-tech fabric with a matte finish.
This seasonal blue reversible windbreaker embodies the idea of ​​a dynamic lifestyle.
node.image_name: Reversible Monogram windbreakers 1.PNG Reversible Monogram windbreakers 1.PNG Reversible Monogram windbreakers 1.PNG Reversible Monogram windbreakers 1.PNG

node.about: With a utilitarian aesthetic, the jacket is adorned with embroidered details in black and white, reflecting the key themes of the Spring-Summer 2023 collection.
node.details: 100% organic cotton GOTS Certification Dark gray color Standard Fit

node.about: This lavender denim jacket features bold, vintage-effect trim.

node.about: This hybrid blouson splices a washed denim hood and sleeves onto the compact cotton felpa

node.about: Indigo Carpenter jeans are utilitarian.

node.itemname: LV x YK Monogram Painted Dots Cargo Pants
node.about: The Louis Vuitton x Yayoi Kusama collection cargo pants feature a combination of Monogram jacquard and a dot print by acclaimed artist Yayoi Kusama.

node.about: Crafted from high-tech fabric with a soft sheen effect, these joggers feature contrasting panel panels with a graphic monochrome LV Dove Houndstooth print.
node.image_name: Joggers in high-tech fabric 1 Joggers in high-tech fabric 2 Joggers in high-tech fabric 3

node.about: The jeans feature a luxurious embossed Monogram pattern.

node.about: These trendy loose-fit jeans are trimmed with a contrasting Monogram jacquard pattern.
node.image_name: Jeans LV 1.PNG Jeans LV 2.PNG Jeans LV 3.PNG Jeans LV 4.PNG

node.about: A favorite of the Spring-Summer 2023 show, these trendy loose-fit jeans feature a distinctive wavy silhouette.

node.about: Crafted from lightweight cotton jersey, this T-shirt features a bold interpretation of the iconic Monogram Gradient pattern in a contrasting white palette.
node.image_name: Monogram Gradient LVSE T-shirt 1.PNG Monogram Gradient LVSE T-shirt 2.PNG Monogram Gradient LVSE T-shirt 3.PNG

node.about: Crafted from lightweight cotton jersey, this T-shirt features a bold interpretation of the iconic Monogram Gradient pattern in a contrasting white palette.

node.about: Crafted from lightweight cotton jersey, this T-shirt features a bold interpretation of the iconic Monogram Gradient pattern in a contrasting white palette.

node.about: An American football-inspired T-shirt crafted from lightweight piqué cotton with a Monogram jacquard pattern.

node.about: This stylish organic cotton T-shirt will add originality to your everyday look.
node.image_name: Organic cotton T-shirt 1.PNG Organic cotton T-shirt 2.PNG Organic cotton T-shirt 3.PNG Organic cotton T-shirt 4.PNG

node.about: The graphic tee features a silk-screened LV Jazz Flyer print. The spectacular pattern is based on bright concert posters, complemented by symbols of the House.
node.image_name: LV Jazz Flyers T-shirt 1.PNG LV Jazz Flyers T-shirt 2.PNG LV Jazz Flyers T-shirt 3.PNG LV Jazz Flyers T-shirt 4.PNG

node.about: The classic T-shirt is embroidered with contrasting miniature initials L and V, recreating the contours of the iconic large LV initials.
node.image_name: T-shirt with LV Spread embroidery 1.PNG T-shirt with LV Spread embroidery 2.PNG T-shirt with LV Spread embroidery 3.PNG T-shirt with LV Spread embroidery 4.PNG

node.about: A soft black t-shirt with a relaxed shoulder line is decorated with a monochrome silkscreen print.
node.image_name: T-shirt with LV Concert print 1.PNG T-shirt with LV Concert print 2.PNG T-shirt with LV Concert print 3.PNG T-shirt with LV Concert print 4.PNG

node.about: Embroidered initials LV in a unique interpretation this season is the main decoration of a stylish T-shirt.

node.about: Introduced by Virgil Abloh, a simple cotton T-shirt is a tribute to the Maison of Louis Vuitton.

node.about: A loose-fitting T-shirt with a ribbed finish is a must-have for a carefree summer look.

node.itemname: LV x YK Psychedelic Flower Tee

node.about: Both sides of the stylish black T-shirt are decorated with a contrasting LV Frequency pattern, which has become a symbol of the new collection.

node.about: A lightweight cotton T-shirt with a contrasting intarsia pattern made from high-tech neon-effect yarns. The date 1854 and the Louis Vuitton signature are the hallmarks of the Maison.
